markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 11
#### Article 47. Registration of Snowmobiles
##### § 2228 — Special events

Snowmobiles operated at special events approved by the commissioner of parks and recreation pursuant to section 25.11 of parks and recreation law shall be exempt from the provisions of this article concerning registration.

*Last modified: Sep. 22, 2014*
